criteria.name: structure_completeness
criteria.check: Co du Title, Abstract, Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion, References (IMRaD)

criteria.name: data_fidelity
criteria.check: So lieu/hinh anh trich dan khop voi source_analysis, khong bia them

criteria.name: citation_format
criteria.check: References dung dinh dang, du so luong toi thieu

criteria.name: clarity
criteria.check: Van phong hoc thuat ro rang

criteria.name: reviewer_verdict
criteria.check: Reviewer Agent khong phat hien loi nghiem trong
